name: mas-scholar-skills
description: Repo-tracked Codex plugin for MAS Scholar Skills capability modules and refs-only skill entry.

interface.shortDescription: Codex skill entry for refs-only scholarly capability modules.
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex skill entry for the ten MAS Scholar Skills capability modules, standard opl scholar-skills CLI readbacks, refs-only materialized candidate packages, and MAS owner-gated authority boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use MAS Scholar Skills to inspect scholarly capability modules.
Materialize a refs-only ScholarSkills candidate package.
Check ScholarSkills authority boundaries before a MAS handoff.
